<?php namespace Spatie\Permission; use Spatie\Permission\Contracts\PermissionsTeamResolver; class DefaultTeamResolver implements PermissionsTeamResolver { protected int|string|null $teamId = null; /** * Set the team id for teams/groups support, this id is used when querying permissions/roles * * @param int|string|\Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model|null $id */ public function setPermissionsTeamId($id): void { if ($id instanceof \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model) { $id = $id->getKey(); } $this->teamId = $id; } public function getPermissionsTeamId(): int|string|null { return $this->teamId; } }
